using global::FluentCommand.Extensions;

namespace TestModels
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for FluentCommand
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class AuditEventDataReaderExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the command against the connection and converts the results to <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/> objects.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQuery"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/> objects.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<global::TestModels.AuditEvent> Query<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQuery dataQuery)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.AuditEvent
        {
            return dataQuery.Query<global::TestModels.AuditEvent>(
                factory: AuditEventDataReaderExtensions.AuditEventFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the query and returns the first row in the result as a <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/> object.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQuery"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/>  if row exists; otherwise null.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.AuditEvent? QuerySingle<TEntity>(

            where TEntity : global::TestModels.AuditEvent

            return dataQuery.QuerySingle<global::TestModels.AuditEvent>(
                factory: AuditEventDataReaderExtensions.AuditEventFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleRow);
        }

        /// <summary>

        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/> objects.

        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<global::TestModels.AuditEvent>> QueryAsync<TEntity>(

            return dataQuery.QueryAsync<global::TestModels.AuditEvent>(

                cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// A factory for creating <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/> objects from the current row in the specified <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataRecord">The open <see cref="T:System.Data.IDataReader"/> to get the object from.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="global::TestModels.AuditEvent"/>  having property names set that match the field names in the <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.AuditEvent AuditEventFactory(this global::System.Data.IDataReader dataRecord)
        {
            if (dataRecord == null)
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dataRecord));

            int v_id = default!;
            global::System.Text.Json.JsonElement v_payload = default!;

            for (var __index = 0; __index < dataRecord.FieldCount; __index++)
            {
                if (dataRecord.IsDBNull(__index))
                     continue;

                var __name = dataRecord.GetName(__index);
                switch (__name)
                {
                    case "Id":
                        v_id = dataRecord.GetInt32(__index);
                        break;
                    case "Payload":
                        var c_payload = global::FluentCommand.Internal.Singleton<global::FluentCommand.Handlers.JsonElementHandler>.Current
                            as global::FluentCommand.IDataFieldConverter<global::System.Text.Json.JsonElement>;

                        v_payload = c_payload.ReadValue(dataRecord, __index);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return new global::TestModels.AuditEvent
            {
                Id =  v_id,
                Payload =  v_payload
            };
        }

    }
